updates.title: May 2026 — Full Operational Refresh
updates.summary: Full data refresh across all seven sources — first complete run since database launch. Two new NEM battery records set: max 5-min charge (3,186.9 MW on 7 May) and max daily charge (15,094.3 MWh on 8 May). Collie Battery both stages confirmed operational July 2025. Liddell BESS and Western Downs Battery now commissioning.

data_refreshed.note: Battery daily records — current to 10 May 2026
Per-DUID dispatch peaks — current to 9 May 2026
Current to March 2026 only — April/May MMSDM archives not yet published by AEMO
Coal unit outage and dispatch data

new_operational.note: Both Stage 1 (219 MW) and Stage 2 (341 MW) operational July 2025. WA/WEM project — not NEM.

nem_records.note: NEW RECORD — up from 2,906.2 MW (+9.7%). Driven by QLD1 peak of 1,398.8 MW

updates.data_quality_notes: Dispatch Region Sum current to March 2026 only — NEMWEB MMSDM archives for April/May not yet published by AEMO (normal ~4-6 week lag). Re-run import_dispatch_regionsum.py in late May/early June. collie-battery cod_current corrected from '2027' to '2025-07'. Bug fixed in import_openelectricity.py: redundant local timedelta import causing UnboundLocalError on line 117.

updates.title: April 2026 — Intelligence & Value Factor
updates.summary: Added Value Factor Intelligence section to Revenue Intel with three new charts: Wind/Solar VF trend (2019–2025), State Cannibalisation Index, and Solar VF by Vintage. AEMO Generation Info and OpenElectricity Metadata refreshed. NEMWEB BESS bid data current to end of March 2026. NEM battery records updated to 16 April 2026.

new_operational.note: 700 MW / 1,400 MWh Origin Energy co-located BESS. Largest single BESS in NEM at commissioning.
540 MW / 1,080 MWh. CS Energy / Amp Energy.
850 MW / 1,680 MWh. NSW Government / Akaysha Energy. Largest NEM battery by MW.

nem_records.note: New NEM record during summer peak demand event
Spring solar oversupply driving record charge
New NEM record — batteries cycling twice in one day
Same day as discharge record — extreme solar event
